data.name: 情趣館大小姐的私人調教日記
data.detailed_description:
❗傳奇藝術家預告❗ Mizuryu Kei 以他驚豔的筆觸，將桃華這位迷人的粉發公主和她那豐滿的M罩杯巨乳演繹得淋漓盡致，火力全開！

桃華和圭司唯一的共同點是，父母的遺產對他們的公眾形象產生了巨大的影響。桃華，身為某位業界大佬的女兒，看起來是一位端莊淑女的典範，一位理想的大小姐。 圭司的父親經營一系列「成人用品」商店，這讓他贏得了花花公子的稱號。他的朋友會向他請教如何取悅女孩，因為一個晚上在性商店工作的男人怎麼會不知道如何讓女孩們心軟呢？

他們在朋友和家人面前的形象與事實相去甚遠！首先，圭司甚至從未擁抱過女孩，更不用說看過裸體的女孩了，他是一個典型的“處女”，而桃華的秘密，嗯…

一天晚上，當他替父親值班時，一位奇怪的客人穿著非常顯眼的偽裝進來，偷走了一個振動器，溜進了女廁所。在與這位潛在危險的扒手對峙之前，圭司做好了應盡的準備，偷偷溜進了女廁所，結果看到的竟然是正經又拘謹的桃華！她正直爽地揮動著，跳著瘋狂的舞蹈！

也許這次奇遇正是兩人所需要的，讓他們彼此關聯，摘下表面偽裝的的面具，開啟一段可以忠於真實自我，即使有時有些墮落的感情！

遊戲特色

  • 原版日本視覺小說的翻譯版本

  • 桃華完全配音，並配有原創日語對話

  • 原畫高清升級，有 16:9 和 4:3 兩種版本

  • 數小時的故事內容

  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效

  • 增強的動畫角色渲染

  • 圖庫和場景選擇

  • 超過 20 個 H 場景教育這個富家女色情禮儀！

情趣館大小姐的私人調教日記是由日本傳奇開發商 ORCSOFT 製作的視覺小說的英文在地化版本。我們 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的玩家提供原始的日本視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**

所有描述和視覺再現的角色均已年滿 18 歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中無任何實際或可識別的未成年人參與。

  • 圖庫和場景選擇

  • 超過 20 個 H 場景教育這個富家女色情禮儀！

data.short_description: 桃華看似端莊大小姐，而當地色情店老闆的兒子圭則號稱鎮上第一花花公子。但事實上，桃華是個隱密的變態，而圭至今仍是處女。當他們發現彼此的秘密後，一連串不斷升級的性愛冒險就此展開！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Secrets of a Porn Shop Princess
data.detailed_description:
❗LEGENDARY ARTIST ALERT ❗ Mizuryu Kei brings the heat with his stunning renderings of MOMOKA the sexy pink haired princess and her luscious M-cup milkers! 

The only thing that Momoka and Keiji have in common is that their parent’s legacies had a great impact on their public image. Momoka, the daughter of some industry big shot, appears to be the model image of a prim and proper lady, an ideal ojou-sama. While Keiji’s father operates a series of “adult goods” stores giving him the reputation of a player, a real casanova, he’s the guy his friends come to for advice about pleasing a girl cause why wouldn’t a guy who spends the evenings working at the sex shop know a thing or three about making chicks weak at the knees?

The masks they wear for their friends and family couldn’t be further from the truth! For one, Keiji hasn’t even hugged a girl let alone seen one naked (with no mosaics at least), he is a quintessential ‘cherry boy’ while Momoka’s secret, well… 

One night while covering a shift for his dad a peculiar guest comes in covered in a very conspicuous disguise and swipes a vibrator and sneaks into the women's bathroom. Before confronting this potentially dangerous shoplifter, Keiji does his due diligence and performs some reconnaissance by peeking into the lady’s room and who else does he see but the uptight, straight-laced Momoka! She’s straight up flicking it, she's bouncing on that vibe crazy style! 

Maybe this freak encounter is just what these two needed to connect and cast off the masks they put on for other people and start a relationship where they can be true to their authentic, sometimes degenerate, selves!



FEATURES

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

  • Momoka is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

  • Hours of story content

  • Audio, including music and special effects

  • Enhanced with animated character sprites

  • Gallery and Scene selections

  • Over 20 H-Scenes of educating this ojou-sama in ero-etiquette!

Secrets of a Porn Shop Princess is the English localization of a Visual Novel created by legendary Japanese developer ORCSOFT. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Momoka is seemingly a prim and proper ojou-sama and Keiji, son of the local porn shop owner, is known as the town's #1 ladies man. But in fact she's a closet pervert and he's still a virgin. When they discover each other's secrets, a series of escalating sexual escapades begins!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Traditional Chinese
